Title: Sync CIIM populates Additional Named Insured from IPS
Description: Ensure the Sync CIIM button fetches IPS data and displays each Additional Named Insured name individually
Preconditions: User is logged into eZdocs; a submission exists in Received Liability LOB; user is on the Liability Information screen
Steps:
1. Navigate to Received Liability LOB.
2. Open an existing submission.
3. Navigate to the Information screen.
4. Click 'Sync CIIM'.
Expected Results: - IPS integration is invoked.\n- Additional Named Insured section displays each name from IPS as a separate line/entry.\n- UI matches the logic file expectation: list of names shown one-by-one.

Title: Sync CIIM shows placeholder when IPS returns no names
Description: Validate the system handles an empty Additional Named Insured payload gracefully
Preconditions: Same preconditions as TC-01; IPS returns empty list for Additional Named Insured
Steps: 1. Perform steps 1-4 from TC-01 with IPS configured to return no names.
Expected Results: - Additional Named Insured section is empty.\n- Placeholder message displays (e.g., 'No additional named insureds returned').\n- No errors are displayed.

Title: Sync CIIM handles IPS connectivity failure
Description: Verify error handling when IPS is unreachable and existing data is not overwritten
Preconditions: Same preconditions as TC-01; IPS endpoint is unavailable or returns error
Steps: 1. Perform steps 1-4 from TC-01 while IPS is offline or returns an error response.
Expected Results: - User sees a clear error message (e.g., 'Unable to sync with IPS. Please try again later.').\n- Existing Additional Named Insured data remains unchanged.\n- No partial data is written.

Title: Sync does not duplicate existing names on repeated sync
Description: Confirm repeated syncs with identical IPS payload do not append duplicates
Preconditions: Same preconditions as TC-01; IPS payload contains a fixed list of names
Steps: 1. Perform steps 1-4 from TC-01 with IPS returning a fixed set of names.\n2. Repeat step 4 (click 'Sync CIIM') without changing IPS data.
Expected Results: - After 1st sync, names appear once.\n- After 2nd sync, the list remains unchanged (no duplicates).\n- Order remains consistent with IPS payload.

Title: Sync parses delimited Additional Named Insured list correctly
Description: Validate the UI parses a delimited (comma/semicolon) string into separate names
Preconditions: Same preconditions as TC-01; IPS returns Additional Named Insured as a delimited string (e.g., 'John Doe; Jane Smith')
Steps: 1. Perform steps 1-4 from TC-01 with IPS returning a delimited string for additional insured names.
Expected Results: - UI splits the delimited string into separate entries.\n- Each name appears on its own line.\n- No combined/concatenated name entries.

Title: Navigation to Sync CIIM follows documented workflow
Description: Validate navigation steps match the reference workflow
Preconditions: User is logged into eZdocs; Received Liability LOB exists
Steps: 1. Follow steps from Navigationsteps.md: log in, locate submission, open, go to Information screen, click 'Sync CIIM'.
Expected Results: - User is able to complete the navigation as documented.\n- 'Sync CIIM' button is available on the Information screen.\n- No navigation dead-ends or missing UI elements.
